name: Chris Redfield
description:
**TW: Intro includes a bit of zombie violence. Nothing graphically gory but zombs.**

(A/B/O AU) What happens when your pheromone suppressant collar gets ripped off during a zombie attack?

On one side, the undead, on the other side your new alpha Field Captain fighting against his instincts to rut and claim you.

First day on the job sucks...

*Omegaverse description belonging to Vastraler*
creator: Merawlee
